missing_capabilities: receipt not exported with verifiable artifact digests

baseline.policy_reason: Baseline mode exports a trace-only bundle without a persisted governance checkpoint.
baseline.review_summary: Bundle is reviewable but one or more evidence-chain checks are missing, inconsistent, or unverifiable.
baseline.title: Summarize architecture path

evidence_chain.goal: Answer which layers appear in the local architecture path without mutating repository state.
evidence_chain.review_summary: Intent, policy, execution verification, and receipt export are all present and independently corroborated.
evidence_chain.title: Summarize architecture path

one_completed_case.takeaway: Both runs finish, but only the evidence-chain run leaves explicit intent, policy, verification, and receipt evidence.
one_completed_case.title: Summarize architecture path

one_policy_blocked_case.goal: Trigger a deterministic budget overflow so the evidence-chain path can block the run explicitly.
one_policy_blocked_case.review_summary: Run was intentionally blocked by policy with status blocked_budget, and the block remains independently reviewable.
one_policy_blocked_case.takeaway: The run is blocked before completion, but the policy decision and bounded receipt still make the stop independently reviewable.
one_policy_blocked_case.title: Budget overflow review

one_tamper_detected_case.goal: Simulate a post-authorization tamper on the action artifact and require the evidence-chain path to flag it.
one_tamper_detected_case.review_summary: Integrity verification independently corroborated a tamper condition.
one_tamper_detected_case.takeaway: The evidence chain does not just log a failure. It records a digest-backed receipt showing that tamper was detected.
one_tamper_detected_case.title: Detect action digest mismatch
